fields.label: Section headline
fields.name: section_headline
fields.instructions: Optional title above the map (e.g. "2026 Tennessee Tree Day Pick-up Sites"). Leave blank to hide.

fields.label: Show search bar
fields.name: show_search
fields.instructions: Display the search bar so users can filter by name or address.

fields.label: Enable clustering
fields.name: enable_clustering
fields.instructions: Group nearby pins into clusters. Turn off to show every pin individually.
